description: Partner, nonprofit, university, refuge friends group, conservancy, and conservation-education wildlife camera sources. These are public viewing, trail-camera, nest-cam, refuge-cam, or partner-hosted surfaces, not open-source media datasets.

default_rules.user_agent: camsleuth/0.1 partner nonprofit camera metadata crawler

sources.display_name: Wheeler Wildlife Refuge Association Livestream
sources.notes: Nonprofit friends-style group tied to Wheeler National Wildlife Refuge.
